ci_policy.advanced: offline contract/security tests are release-blocking; live provider tests are advisory
ci_policy.live: scheduled or manual and non-blocking for core Docs health

dependency_policy.decision: Keep current placement in Task 29 for compatibility; Task 24 owns install-profile migration.
